hooks.name: a11y-session-start
hooks.description: Initialize accessibility review session and announce loaded skills

hooks.name: a11y-detect-web-project
hooks.description: Detect web UI project and inject accessibility reminder before agent processes prompt

hooks.name: a11y-enforce-edit-gate
hooks.description: Block UI file edits until accessibility-lead skill has been activated

hooks.name: a11y-mark-reviewed
hooks.description: Create accessibility review marker after accessibility-lead skill completes

hooks.name: a11y-session-end
hooks.description: Remove accessibility review marker at session end
